name: get_marked_objects
full_help:
get_marked_objects

Description: 
Get marked objects

Syntax: 
get_marked_objects  [-rgb <args>] [-color <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of marked objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-rgb]      RGB color index list
  [-color]    Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, GUIControl

arguments.description: Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
Suspend message limits during command execution
